# Aziana

Aziana is a waterfront Asian fusion restaurant and bar at Bobby's Marina in Philipsburg, Sint Maarten.

## Core pages

- Homepage: https://aziana.sx/
- FAQ: https://aziana.sx/faq.html
- Current campaigns: https://aziana.sx/seasonal-campaigns.html
- Events and catering: https://aziana.sx/events-catering-sint-maarten.html
- Menu PDF: https://aziana.sx/menus/Marina_Menu_2026.pdf
- AI knowledge seed: https://aziana.sx/ai-knowledge.json
- Menu highlights: https://aziana.sx/menu-highlights.json
- Site index: https://aziana.sx/site-index.json
- Shared business data: https://aziana.sx/site-data.json
- Campaign schedule: https://aziana.sx/campaign-config.json

## SEO landing pages

- Sushi in Philipsburg: https://aziana.sx/sushi-philipsburg.html
- Waterfront restaurant in Philipsburg: https://aziana.sx/waterfront-restaurant-philipsburg.html
- Poke bowls in Sint Maarten: https://aziana.sx/poke-bowls-sint-maarten.html
- Asian fusion in Sint Maarten: https://aziana.sx/asian-fusion-sint-maarten.html
- Bar and lounge in Philipsburg: https://aziana.sx/bar-lounge-philipsburg.html
- Takeout and online ordering: https://aziana.sx/takeout-online-ordering-sint-maarten.html
- Visitor restaurant page: https://aziana.sx/restaurant-near-cruise-port-philipsburg.html
- Family and group dining: https://aziana.sx/family-group-dining-philipsburg.html

## Business summary

Aziana serves sushi, sashimi, poke bowls, seafood, steaks, satay, snack platters and Chinese-Indonesian specialties.

Kitchen hours listed on the website are Monday to Saturday from 12:00 to 22:00. Sunday is listed as closed.

## Automation note

The website uses shared data files for lower-maintenance updates. General business details live in /site-data.json. Campaign visibility lives in /campaign-config.json. The shared /site-automation.js script updates years, action buttons, contact blocks, event inquiry templates, simple click tracking events and relevant campaign cards on pages that include it. Annual campaigns rotate by month and day instead of needing yearly date edits.

## Common guest actions

- Order online: use the Order Online button on the website.
- Reserve a table: use the Reserve a Table button on the website or contact Aziana directly.
- Group inquiries: collect date, guest count, budget, food preferences and contact details.
- General inquiries: contact Aziana by phone, WhatsApp or email from the website.
